rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §29.358, which governs comptroller preapproval of education service providers and vendors. The provisions address unrelated subject matter.
quote: Sec. 29.358. PREAPPROVED PROVIDERS AND VENDORS. (a) The comptroller shall by rule establish a process for the preapproval of education service providers and vendors of educational products for participation in the program.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns education provider/vendor preapproval and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
